persona: Maya, 28, marketing manager in São Paulo

findings.title: Agent has 0.001 SUI; faucet will fail with 'out of gas'
findings.repro: sui client balance on the agent address (also the deployer) 0x0cdc0f4df0284828adde270ab50db083341135562866c26404ec945597d49716 shows 1,021,150 MIST = 0.001 SUI
findings.suggestedFix: Top up via https://faucet.sui.io/?address=0x0cdc0f4df0284828adde270ab50db083341135562866c26404ec945597d49716 or transfer from another testnet account

findings.title: README still claims 'Next.js 15 PWA' but the PWA was intentionally disabled in R48
buildPlaceOrderTx doesn't pre-flight market.status; resolved market produces opaque on-chain abort
findings.repro: SDK caller invokes buildPlaceOrderTx on a resolved market without checking status
findings.expected: buildPlaceOrderTx throws 'market is resolved, cannot place order'
findings.actual: PTB builds and aborts on-chain with EMarketNotActive
findings.suggestedFix: Add a `marketStatus` parameter to buildPlaceOrderTx; throw if not 'active'

findings.title: New DistributionSet event (from MOVE-GAP-16 fix) is not consumed by the agents indexer
findings.repro: set_distribution on a fresh PrizePool emits the event; agents/position-indexer.ts doesn't subscribe
findings.expected: agents/prize-admin.ts logs the new curve; off-chain leaderboard picks it up
findings.suggestedFix: Add a queryEvents subscription for DistributionSet in apps/agents/src/agents/prize-admin.ts
